channel.title: PICOCTF2022 on Tzion
channel.description: Recent content in PICOCTF2022 on Tzion

item.title: [PICOCTF 2022] Forensics
item.description: This writeup contains 11 out of 13 Forensics category challenges in PicoCTF 2022 that i manage to solve. Enhance! Description Download this image file and find the flag. This challenge provided a SVG image file. To solve it, we just need to view the text inside the SVG image file: strings drawing.flag.svg Then concat the flag char by char: <tspan sodipodi:role="line" x="107.43014" y="132.08501" style="font-size:0.00352781px;line-height:1.25;fill:#ffffff;stroke-width:0.26458332;" id="tspan3748">p </tspan><tspan sodipodi:role="line" x="107.43014" y="132.08942" style="font-size:0.00352781px;line-height:1.25;fill:#ffffff;stroke-width:0.26458332;" id="tspan3754">i </tspan><tspan sodipodi:role="line" x="107.

item.title: [PICOCTF 2022] Reverse Engineering
item.description: This writeup contains 11 out of 12 Reverse Engineering category challenges in PicoCTF 2022 that i manage to solve. file-run1 Description A program has been provided to you, what happens if you try to run it on the command line? This challenge provided an executable. We just need to execute the executable to obtain the flag. Flag: picoCTF{U51N6_Y0Ur_F1r57_F113_9bc52b6b} file-run2 Description Another program, but this time, it seems to want some input.
